/bin/zsh -lc "bash -lc '
set -euo pipefail

queue=(\"dir:crates/orbit-engine/src\")
seen_dirs=\"\"

process_file() {
  local file_sel=\""'$1"
  local file_input
  file_input=$(jq -nc --arg s "$file_sel" '"'{selectors:["'$s], summary:false}'"')
  local file_pack
  file_pack="'$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$file_input")

  local sym_input
  sym_input=$(printf "%s" "$file_pack" | jq -c '"'{selectors:[.entries[0].symbol_summary[]? | select(.kind==\"function\" or .kind==\"method\") | .selector], summary:false}')

  local count
  count="'$(printf "%s" "$sym_input" | jq '"'.selectors | length')
  if [ \""'$count" -eq 0 ]; then
    return
  fi

  local sym_pack
  sym_pack=$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$sym_input")
  printf "%s'"\\n\" \""'$sym_pack" | jq -r '"'.entries[] | select(((.source // \"\") | contains(\".run_deterministic(\"))) | [.selector, .name] | @tsv'
}

while [ "'${#queue[@]} -gt 0 ]; do
  dir_sel="${queue[0]}"
  queue=("${queue[@]:1}")

  # simple seen-set check using newline delimiters
  case "'"\\n"'$seen_dirs'"\\n\" in
    *\"\\n"'$dir_sel'"\\n\"*) continue ;;
  esac
  seen_dirs=\""'$seen_dirs'"\\n"'$dir_sel"

  dir_input=$(jq -nc --arg s "$dir_sel" '"'{selectors:["'$s], summary:false}'"')
  dir_pack="'$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.pack --input "$dir_input")

  mapfile -t children < <(printf "%s" "$dir_pack" | jq -r '"'.entries[0].children[]?')
  for child in \""'${children[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$child" == dir:* ]]; then
      queue+=("$child")
    elif [[ "$child" == file:* ]] && [[ "$child" == *.rs ]]; then
      if [[ "$child" == *"/tests/"* ]]; then
        continue
      fi
      process_file "$child"
    fi
  done

done
'"'"

/bin/zsh -lc 'selectors=(
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/agent_loop_driver.rs#drive_agent_loop:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/agent_loop_driver.rs#drive_agent_loop_with_session:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/cli_runner.rs#run_cli_backend:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/dispatcher.rs#dispatch_v2_activity:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/dispatcher.rs#run_deterministic:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/dispatcher.rs#run_agent_loop_activity:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/dispatcher.rs#run_agent_loop_via_driver:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs#run_groundhog_activity:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs#run_attempt:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs#verify_checkpoint:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs#run_workspace_command:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs#persist_runner_artifacts:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs#load_task:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/groundhog.rs#load_task_artifacts:function"
"symbol:crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/job_executor.rs#execute_job:function"
)

for sel in $selectors; do
  attempt=0
  while true; do
    input=$(jq -nc --arg s "$sel" '"'{selector:"'$s}'"')
    out="'$(orbit tool run orbit.graph.show --input "$input")
    code=$(print -r -- "$out" | jq -r '"'.code // empty')
    if [[ \""'$code" == "store_error" ]]; then
      attempt=$((attempt + 1))
      if (( attempt >= 6 )); then
        print -r -- "ERROR'"\\t"'$sel'"\\tstore_error\"
        break
      fi
      sleep 1
      continue
    fi

    file="'$(print -r -- "$out" | jq -r '"'.selector | sub(\""'^symbol:"; "") | split("#")[0]'"')
    fn="'$(print -r -- "$out" | jq -r '"'.source | capture(\"fn\\\\s+(?<n>[A-Za-z0-9_]+)\\\\s*\\\\(\").n')
    has="'$(print -r -- "$out" | jq -r '"'((.source // \"\") | contains(\".run_deterministic(\"))')
    print -r -- \"CHECK\\t"'$file'"\\t"'$fn'"\\t"'$has"
    if [[ "$has" == "true" ]]; then
      print -r -- "MATCH'"\\t"'$file'"\\t"'$fn"
    fi
    break
  done
done
'
